responsibilities: Lead end-to-end planning and execution of complex, cross-functional programs spanning multiple teams and business units
Develop and maintain program roadmaps, tracking key milestones, dependencies, and deliverables against committed timelines
Identify and proactively mitigate program risks, escalating critical issues to executive sponsors with proposed resolution paths
Coordinate resource allocation across engineering, product, and business teams to ensure program staffing meets delivery needs
Manage program budgets, tracking spend against forecast and reporting variances to finance and senior leadership
Facilitate steering committee meetings and executive status reviews, communicating progress, risks, and key decisions
Drive process improvements and operational rigor across teams to increase delivery predictability and program efficiency
Manage vendor and third-party partner relationships to ensure contractual deliverables align with program requirements
